CCW Codebook - Accountable Care Organizations (ACO) Pioneer
CCW Record Layout - Accountable Care Organizations (ACO) Pioneer
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| BENE_ID | Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID | 
| BENE_ACO_YEAR | Year of Beneficiary Claims | 
| ACO_ID | Pioneer ACO Identifier | 
| BIRTH_DT | Date of Birth | 
| DEATH_DT | Date of Death | 
| SEX_CD | Sex | 
| MO1_ALIGN | Month 1 Alignment Flag | 
| MO2_ALIGN | Month 2
